login.title: Fáilte ar ais
login.subtitle: Sínigh isteach i do bhanc ama

forgotPassword.title: Pasfhocal dearmadta?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Cuir isteach do r-phost agus seolfaimid nasc slan athshocraithe chugat.
forgotPassword.successSubtitle: Ma ta cuntas leis an r-phost sin ann, seoladh nasc athshocraithe.
forgotPassword.helpText: D'fheadfadh an nasc cupla noimead a thogail. Seiceail an filltean spam freisin.
forgotPassword.rateLimited: An iomarca iarratas. Fan cupla noimead agus bain triail eile as.
forgotPassword.genericError: Niorbh fheider nasc athshocraithe a sheoladh. Bain triail eile as.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successSubtitle: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidSubtitle: This password reset link is missing or no longer valid.
resetPassword.genericError: We could not reset your password. Please request a new link.

verifyEmail.loadingSubtitle: This should only take a moment.
verifyEmail.successSubtitle: Your email address has been verified.
verifyEmail.invalidSubtitle: This email verification link is missing or no longer valid.
verifyEmail.genericError: We could not verify your email. Please request a new link.
verifyEmail.resendHint: Sign in to request another verification email from your account settings.

register.title: Cruthaigh cuntas
register.subtitle: Bí páirteach i do phobal baincéireachta ama áitiúil
register.termsAccepted: I agree to the platform terms and privacy notice.
register.successSubtitle: Your account was created and is waiting for verification.
register.successDefaultMessage: Registration successful. Please check your email before signing in.

errors.emailTaken: Tá cuntas ann cheana leis an ríomhphost seo.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 12 characters.
errors.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
errors.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
errors.unableToSignIn: Ní féidir síniú isteach. Bain triail eile as.
errors.unableToRegister: Unable to register. Please try again.
errors.validEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid international phone number.
errors.termsRequired: Please accept the platform terms and privacy notice.

selectTenant.title: Roghnaigh do bhanc ama
selectTenant.subtitle: Roghnaigh an pobal a mbaineann tú leis
selectTenant.tapToChoose: Tapáil chun an pobal seo a úsáid
selectTenant.footer: Úsáidtear do phobal roghnaithe chun síniú isteach, clárú agus ábhar áitiúil.
